title: Executive Briefing Agent
summary: A production-ready agent blueprint that compiles and delivers a personalized daily executive briefing every business morning. Aggregates news, calendar context, email priority signals, and KPI snapshots into a 5-minute structured brief delivered before the workday begins.
targetAudience: Founders and CEOs at growth-stage companies
Executive assistants looking to automate briefing preparation
goals: Eliminate 30–45 minutes of morning information gathering daily
Ensure leadership never misses key developments from critical sources
Provide meeting context automatically before each calendar event
Surface KPI movements and threshold breaches proactively

workflowStages.description: Agent queries all configured sources: news APIs, calendar, flagged emails, KPI dashboards, and monitoring alerts on the configured schedule.
Raw data is processed, ranked by priority rules, and synthesized into the brief structure: headlines, today's agenda, metric movements, and action items.
Brief is formatted according to the configured template (executive summary, meeting-by-meeting breakdowns, metrics table, alert section).
Formatted brief is delivered to the configured channel (email, Slack, Notion) at the scheduled time. Delivery confirmation logged.

timeline: 3–5 business days to deploy and configure
pricingFrom: Included in Founder Agent Stack service
prerequisites: Calendar API access (Google or Microsoft)
Email read-only OAuth (Gmail or Outlook)
At least 2 news/data source API keys
KPI dashboard with API or webhook support
deliverables: Configured agent workflow in OpenClaw runtime
Brief template customized to your format preferences
Source configuration and priority rules documented
Delivery channel integration tested and verified
1-week tuning period with feedback integration
guardrails: Read-only access to all data sources — no write permissions
Email draft capability explicitly disabled
Credentials stored in vault — never in configuration files
Delivery failures trigger fallback notification, never silent failure
successMetrics: Brief delivered before 7:30 AM on 95%+ of business days
Executive rates brief as 'useful' or 'very useful' within 2 weeks
Morning information-gathering time reduced by measurable amount
Zero missed critical alerts from configured sources
seoDescription: Deploy a production-ready executive briefing agent in 3–5 days. Automated daily brief from news, calendar, email, and KPIs — delivered every morning.

title: Sales Intelligence Pack
summary: A multi-skill agent bundle that automates the full inbound lead lifecycle: enrichment, qualification scoring, personalized follow-up drafting, and CRM population. Designed for solo consultants and small sales teams who need to respond faster without hiring.
targetAudience: Solo consultants and freelancers with inbound lead flow
Small sales teams (1–5 reps) at SMB companies
Agencies managing client lead generation programs
goals: Reduce time from lead capture to first qualified outreach by 80%
Ensure every inbound lead is enriched and scored before first contact
Eliminate manual CRM data entry for new contacts
Give sales reps a personalized email draft ready for review within minutes of lead arrival

includedSkills.note: Company and contact data enrichment from public sources
Prospect company research and buying signal detection
Post-call summary and CRM note creation

workflowStages.description: New lead arrives via form, email, or CRM integration. Workflow triggered automatically.
Lead Enrichment skill pulls company data, LinkedIn profile, technographics, and buying signals. Results populate CRM automatically.
Enriched lead is scored against ICP criteria. Score and justification added to CRM record.
Research Summarizer builds a prospect brief including company overview, recent news, and relevant context for the sales rep.
Email Drafter produces a personalized first-touch email using enriched context. Draft staged in review queue.
Sales rep reviews brief, draft, and score. Edits as needed. Sends the email. All activity logged to CRM.

timeline: 5–7 business days to deploy and integrate
pricingFrom: Included in Sales Automation Setup service
prerequisites: CRM with API access (HubSpot, Salesforce, or Pipedrive)
Lead capture form with webhook output
Enrichment API key (Apollo, Clearbit, or equivalent)
Email client OAuth access (read + draft, no auto-send)
deliverables: Configured multi-skill workflow in OpenClaw runtime
CRM field mapping documentation
ICP scoring rubric configured and validated
Email tone profile set up with example drafts
Integration test with 10 sample leads
Runbook for sales team
guardrails: Email Drafter never sends autonomously — always staged for human review
Enrichment data sourced from compliant providers only
All lead data handled under configured privacy policy
CRM writes limited to designated fields only — no bulk record modification
successMetrics: Lead-to-first-contact time reduced from hours/days to under 30 minutes
CRM data completeness score improves by 40%+
Sales rep spends <5 minutes per lead on research and draft review
Response rate improves vs. pre-automation baseline
seoDescription: Deploy a complete inbound sales intelligence system in 5–7 days. Automated lead enrichment, scoring, research, and email drafting — human sends.

title: Recruiting Ops Agent
summary: Automates the administrative and research-heavy parts of a recruiting pipeline: job ad creation, application screening, interview scheduling coordination, and candidate brief preparation. Designed for HR leads and operators at growing SMBs who are recruiting without a full-time recruiter.
targetAudience: HR managers and operators at 10–100 person companies
Small recruiting firms and talent agencies
goals: Reduce time-to-post for new roles from days to hours
Eliminate manual application review for clearly disqualified candidates
Give hiring managers a structured brief on each shortlisted candidate before interviews
Reduce recruiter administrative time by 50%+

includedSkills.note: Role brief to compliant job ad in multiple formats
Application scoring and ranked shortlist generation
Candidate background research for shortlisted applicants
Pipeline stage automation and notification routing

workflowStages.description: Hiring manager completes role brief form. Job Ad Writer generates compliant ad drafts for review.
Applications arrive via ATS. Candidate Screener batches and scores each applicant against role criteria.
Hiring manager reviews ranked shortlist with AI-generated justification notes. Approves advancement decisions.
Research Summarizer prepares structured candidate brief for each shortlisted applicant before interviews.
Email Drafter prepares rejection drafts for disqualified candidates and interview invite drafts for advancing candidates. All staged for HR review.
ATS and workflow logs updated at each stage. Metrics tracked for time-to-fill and pipeline health.

timeline: 5–8 business days to deploy and configure
pricingFrom: Included in Recruiting Operations Automation service
prerequisites: ATS with API access (Greenhouse, Lever, or equivalent)
Job posting accounts configured
Role brief template defined
HR review process for AI screening outputs documented
deliverables: Configured recruiting workflow in OpenClaw runtime
Job ad templates for 3 sample roles
Screening criteria schema for configured role types
Candidate communication templates
HR runbook with human oversight protocol
CHRC compliance advisory notes
guardrails: All candidate screening outputs require human review before any candidate communication
No AI-generated rejections sent without human approval
CHRC bias advisory notes included in all screening outputs
Candidate data handled under privacy policy and data retention rules
successMetrics: Time-to-post reduced by 60%+
HR screening time reduced from hours to <30 minutes per posting
Hiring manager satisfaction with candidate brief quality
Compliance review: zero prohibited criteria in job ads
seoDescription: Automate your recruiting pipeline with AI — job ad writing, candidate screening, and communication drafts — with human oversight at every step.

title: Finance Ops Agent
summary: Automates routine finance operations for SMB: invoice processing, AP data entry, expense categorization, and monthly reporting assembly. Designed for founders and bookkeepers who spend too much time on data entry and report preparation.
targetAudience: SMB founders managing their own bookkeeping
Bookkeepers and accountants at small firms
goals: Eliminate manual invoice data entry into accounting software
Reduce monthly close preparation time by 50%+
Ensure AP invoices are matched to POs before posting
Automate monthly financial reporting assembly for review

includedSkills.note: Invoice extraction and AP entry drafting
Monthly close schedule and approval routing

workflowStages.description: Invoices arrive via email or upload. Invoice Processor extracts data and matches to PO records.
Matched invoices create draft accounting entries staged for bookkeeper review and approval.
Unmatched invoices and anomalies flagged for manual review. Alert Digest delivers daily exception summary.
Report Builder assembles financial report from accounting data at configured schedule. Draft delivered for review.
Bookkeeper or founder reviews all drafts, makes adjustments, and approves posting. Final report distributed.

timeline: 5–7 business days to deploy and integrate
pricingFrom: Included in Finance Operations Automation service
prerequisites: Accounting software with API (QuickBooks, Xero, or Sage)
Invoice intake email or document storage configured
Chart of accounts and PO database accessible
Bookkeeper or finance lead for review approvals
deliverables: Configured finance workflow in OpenClaw runtime
Invoice extraction model calibrated to your invoice formats
Monthly report template configured
AP approval workflow documented
Integration test with 20 sample invoices
Bookkeeper handoff documentation
guardrails: No invoice is posted without human approval
All AP entries above configured threshold require additional sign-off
Accounting system access limited to draft creation — no direct posting without human action
Audit log maintained for all agent actions
successMetrics: Invoice processing time reduced from hours to minutes
AP data entry errors eliminated for matched invoices
Monthly close time reduced by measurable hours
Bookkeeper satisfaction with draft quality
seoDescription: Automate invoice processing, AP entry, and monthly financial reporting with AI — human approval required before any accounting entries are posted.

title: Marketing Content Agent
summary: Automates the weekly content production workflow for marketing teams and solo marketers: topic research, social post drafting, content calendar management, and performance data collection. Reduces content creation time while maintaining consistent brand voice.
targetAudience: Digital agencies managing multiple client accounts
goals: Reduce weekly content production time by 60%+
Maintain consistent posting schedule without manual calendar management
Ensure all content is reviewed and approved before publication
Build a content pipeline that stays 2 weeks ahead of schedule

includedSkills.note: Post drafting and scheduling queue management

workflowStages.description: Research Summarizer identifies trending topics, competitor content, and relevant industry developments each week.
Topics mapped to content calendar slots. Marketer reviews and approves topic plan before drafting begins.
Social Content Scheduler drafts posts for each approved topic. Email Drafter prepares newsletter draft if scheduled.
All drafts staged in approval queue. Marketer reviews, edits, and approves each piece before it enters scheduling.
Approved content scheduled via platform APIs. Publication confirmation logged. Performance tracking begins.
Alert Digest delivers weekly performance summary. Insights fed back into next week's topic planning.

timeline: 3–5 business days to deploy and configure
pricingFrom: Included in Marketing Automation Setup service
prerequisites: Social platform API access (LinkedIn, and optionally others)
Brand voice guidelines document
Content calendar template defined
Marketing review process established
deliverables: Configured marketing content workflow in OpenClaw runtime
Brand voice profile configured from your examples
Content calendar template integrated
Approval queue workflow set up
Integration test with 2 weeks of content
Marketer runbook
guardrails: No content published without explicit human approval
Brand voice guidelines enforced — drafts flagged if guidelines violated
Platform API credentials rotated on configured schedule
Content archive maintained for all published and rejected drafts
successMetrics: Weekly content production time reduced by 60%+
Posting consistency: scheduled posts published on time 95%+
Marketer reviews and approves content in <2 hours per week
Content pipeline stays 2+ weeks ahead of schedule
seoDescription: Automate your weekly content production with AI — topic research, post drafting, and scheduling — with human approval before every publication.
